---
title: "In-Class Exercises"
format: html
editor: visual
---

<div class="section-header">
  <p>This section contains the in-class exercises completed for the module.</p>
</div>

<div class="exercise-list">

<a href="in-class/exercise2.html" class="exercise-link">
<div class="exercise-card">

### Exercise 2

<div class="exercise-meta">Latest published</div>

This exercise focuses on applied classroom visualisation techniques and chart comparisons.

</div>
</a>

<a href="in-class/exercise1.html" class="exercise-link">
<div class="exercise-card">

### Exercise 1

<div class="exercise-meta">Earlier exercise</div>

This exercise focuses on basic plotting and getting started with visual analytics tools.

</div>
</a>

</div>
